name: Sesame Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch strips
8 ounces bamboo shoots, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, soy sauce, sherry, and cornstarch in a bowl and stir. Let marinate 15 minutes.
2. Heat peanut oil in a wok or large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add snow peas, garlic, and chili paste and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add the chicken with marinade and stir-fry until the chicken is cooked through, about 3 minutes.
4. Add bamboo shoots and water chestnuts and stir-fry until the chicken is almost cooked through, about 2 more minutes.
5. Mix in broth. Stir in sesame seeds, green onions, and sesame oil. Cook for an additional 30 seconds.
6. Serve with steamed rice.
